task: Make Day 1 training images and selected AI app installation guidance visible

governance_bootstrap.summary: Harness product changes must be mobile-first and verified against the actual user-facing experience before completion.
Code, deployment, UI, and customer-facing changes require real verification and completion evidence guard before reporting complete.

requirements.requirement: Day 1 training card must show actual educational images, not only text.
requirements.evidence: Added four visible SVG assets under harness-os/edu-app/public/training/day1 and rendered visual_assets plus tool card images in Day1PracticeLab.

requirements.requirement: Users who do not know how to install or open Gemini, Claude, or ChatGPT need step-by-step guidance.
requirements.evidence: Added selected-LLM install_guide data with app search, web fallback, login, and input-box confirmation steps.

requirements.requirement: Existing Day 1 sessions should receive the new visual guidance.
requirements.evidence: Bumped practice_lab_version to 2026-06-30-guided-images-v2 and updated refresh migration tests.

requirements.requirement: Mac Mini production deployment and runtime verification.
requirements.evidence: Selected-path Mac Mini deploy passed, edu-app production bundle rebuilt, SVG files returned HTTP 200, and deployed backend payload returned visual_assets plus selected Claude install steps.

changes: Added four Day 1 educational SVG assets: prepare material, remove private information, install/open AI app, and verify answer.
Added practice_lab.visual_assets and practice_lab.install_guide to the Day 1 curriculum payload.
Rendered a four-image learning strip, per-step card images, and a selected-tool installation guide in Day1PracticeLab.
Extended TypeScript contracts and regression tests for the image and installation-guide payload.
